grid_patterns.services: Bento Grid (Asymmetrical): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8. Mix of col-span-4, col-span-8 to create a modern, non-standard look.
grid_patterns.about: 2-Column Split: Sticky portrait on the left (col-span-5), scrolling timeline/content on the right (col-span-7).
grid_patterns.blog: Standard 3-column with gap-8, items stretch to h-full.

surface_styles.header: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/20. Sticky top with z-50.
surface_styles.cards: Flat background (white or seafoam) with no shadow or very diffuse ambient shadow (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]). 1px border of border-cyan-100.
surface_styles.overlays: Hero overlay should be bg-black/20 to bg-black/40 max, ensuring text readability without mudding the image.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Smooth scroll using Lenis is MANDATORY for the premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Apply subtle y-axis parallax to hero image and abstract background blobs using framer-motion useScroll.
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Staggered fade-up animations (y: 30, opacity: 0 -> 1) for all section contents when in view using framer-motion whileInView.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase. Buttons: scale-105 or background slide effect.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glass header with anchors (#services, #about, #blog, #testimonials, #contact). Smooth scroll to sections. Include FR/EN language toggle.
components_strategy.hero: Min-h-screen. Full bleed background image with parallax. Large H1, clear subtext, primary CTA 'Book a Session'.
components_strategy.services: Custom HTML/Tailwind bento grid. Do not use generic Shadcn Cards. Use overlapping elements and negative space.
components_strategy.about_timeline: Vertical line indicator. Staggered timeline items for certifications/journey.
components_strategy.testimonials: Swiper carousel or framer-motion drag slider. Large text, clean typography.
components_strategy.calendly: Embed section with a soft seafoam background to distinguish it from standard white sections.
components_strategy.contact: Shadcn Form components heavily customized for modern, minimal inputs (e.g., bottom border only, floating labels).

hero_background.description: Calm ocean waves, to be used with a max 30% black overlay and parallax effect for the Hero section.

about_portrait.description: Portrait of Sophie Lamour. Use in the About section (left sticky column) with rounded-[2rem] corners.

services_abstract_bg.description: Abstract blue/turquoise watercolor. Can be used as a subtle background pattern for the services or testimonials section (use low opacity).

testing.required_attributes: Add data-testid to all navigation links, buttons, form inputs, and the language toggle.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build as a single-page application using anchors (#services, #about, etc.) for navigation.
Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis is recommended, or CSS scroll-behavior: smooth).
Ensure the design does NOT look like a generic template. Rely on the Bento Grid and asymmetrical layouts.
Use Framer Motion to create parallax in the hero and scroll-reveal effects on all main sections.
Keep typography crisp: tightly tracked headings (Outfit font) and legible body text (Manrope font).
Include a 'Social Media Auto-post' visual badge or tag on the Blog Preview section as requested.
The Calendly section can just be a styled placeholder or an iframe if no actual link is provided, but it must look integrated.
Language toggle (FR/EN) in the header should update the state (can be mocked for MVP) and change text if possible, but at least the UI toggle must be present.
